headlines.title: Bugs and black mold: What some mobile home park residents see after investors buy in
headlines.description: In recent years, mobile home properties have become less affordable as an influx of large companies have bought up the parks and raised rents and fees.

headlines.title: Inflation jumps to 4.2%, the highest since early 2023
headlines.description: Consumers and U.S. workers are feeling the pinch of a wage growth rate that lags behind the rate of inflation.

headlines.title: US Strikes Iran in Retaliation of Downed Apache Helicopter
headlines.description: The United States announced it retaliated to Iran’s downing of a U.S. Army Apache helicopter by attacking Iranian air defense, ground control stations and surveillance radar sites near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran claims it returned fired with 21 attacks against U.S. military targets across the Middle East. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.

headlines.title: Key test for Democrats in Maine
headlines.description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner is poised to win a primary election tonight as he’s facing a series of scandals. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: Violent Anti-Immigration Protests Erupt Across Northern Ireland
headlines.description: U.K. leaders are calling for calm after a night of violence erupted across Northern Ireland where hundreds of anti-immigration protesters took to the streets of Belfast torching homes and vehicles. It comes after the arrest of a Sudanese man accused in a brutal knife attack that left one man with serious injuries.

headlines.title: A family’s desperate choice: the massive debt to save their daughter
headlines.description: In our series 'The Cost of Denial' NBC News’ Kate Snow meets with the parents who decided to keep their daughter in a specialized mental health care facility despite knowing it didn’t take insurance. They hoped they’d work out a deal for coverage but now find themselves more than a million dollars in debt. They believed that without the treatment, their daughter would die.

headlines.title: Before arrest with 303 gold bars, CIA officer spun tale he was Top Gun fighter pilot
headlines.description: David Rush’s former firefighter colleagues looked up to him as an ace pilot. Now they wonder whether he was making it all up “like Leonardo DiCaprio in ‘Catch Me If You Can.’”

headlines.title: Here Are the Top Players to Watch in the 2026 FIFA World Cup
headlines.description: From perennial powerhouses in Europe and South America to underdogs from around the globe, many of soccer’s very best are converging on the United States for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. NBC’s Jesse Kirsch reports for TODAY with the top players to watch.

headlines.title: Referee barred from entering U.S. for World Cup receives a hero’s welcome in Somalia
headlines.description: Somalia is not competing at the World Cup, but from the scenes at Mogadishu’s airport Wednesday, you’d think the country had won the trophy.

headlines.title: Workers at L.A.-area World Cup stadium reach tentative agreement after authorizing strike
headlines.description: Unite Here Local 11, which represents nearly 2,000 cooks, dishwashers, bartenders and concession workers at SoFi Stadium, voted just last week to authorize a strike.

headlines.title: Pope Leo holds Mass at the Sagrada Família basilica
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as Pope Leo XIV holds Mass at Barcelona’s iconic La Sagrada Família designed by Antoni Gaudí. Leo will also bless the basilica, which is now the tallest church in the world.
